# Remediate

> Open-source React component for in-app feedback. Captures screenshots, video, voice notes, and annotations. Routes to Slack, Linear, GitHub, email, or webhooks.

## What is Remediate?

Remediate is an npm package (`npm install remediate`) that adds a feedback widget to any React app. Users capture screenshots, screen recordings, voice notes, and element annotations without leaving the page. The widget POSTs structured FormData to your endpoint. A server helper (`parseFeedback` from `remediate/server`) parses the submission into typed JSON and a file map. You own the data — no accounts, no SaaS, no storage. MIT licensed.

## Key facts

- Package: `npm install remediate`
- Also available as a script tag for non-React sites
- React 18+ and React 19 compatible
- Works with React Server Components (widget is client, server helper is server-only)
- Bundle: ~14kb gzipped core, +8kb video (lazy), +2kb voice (lazy)
- Requires HTTPS for video and voice (localhost works in dev)
- TypeScript types included
- Accessible: keyboard nav, focus traps, screen reader labels via `messages` prop
- i18n: all strings overridable via `messages` prop
- No telemetry, no phone-home

## Capture modes

- **Screenshots**: DOM-based PNG of a selected region
- **Screen recordings**: real video via getDisplayMedia (desktop only)
- **Voice notes**: microphone recording via getUserMedia
- **Annotations**: pin on a DOM element with selector, path, computed styles, bounding rect, nearby text
- **Text notes**: plain text from the user

## Integration targets

The server route you write can forward feedback anywhere:
- Slack (webhook)
- Discord (webhook)
- GitHub Issues (API)
- Linear (GraphQL API)
- Email (Resend, SendGrid, etc.)
- Vercel Blob + database
- Postgres + Drizzle (self-hosted)
- Any webhook endpoint

## Documentation

- Getting started: https://remediate.ski/docs/install

- Privacy & capture: https://remediate.ski/docs/privacy
- API reference: https://remediate.ski/docs/reference
- FAQ: https://remediate.ski/docs/faq
